title: Chapter 207
content:
Chapter 207: Chapter 207: When the Quest Serves Itself on a Silver Platter [1]

Jax pushed the door open.

Empty.

The room was completely empty. Just moonlight streaming through curtains, casting silver shadows across expensive furniture.

’What the hell? I definitely saw—’

Before his mind could finish the thought, arms wrapped around his chest from behind. Soft. Warm. Unmistakably feminine.

Jax’s combat instincts flared. His muscles tensed, ready to deliver punishment to whoever dared—

Then he caught her features in the mirror across the room.

Silver-platinum hair cascading like liquid moonlight. Green eyes glittering with mischief. Barely visible wrinkles that somehow added elegance rather than age. And those distinctly pointed elf ears.

She wore a short white silk royal dress with gold embroidery that hugged her waist like it was painted on. A jeweled belt sparkled at her hips. High heels. A small tiara nestled in her hair.

Jax recognized her instantly.

Aeliana’s grandmother.

’Fuck. I walked straight into a spider’s web like a dumb fly. The one person I wanted to avoid at this party. How the hell did I forget about this madwoman?’

Her hands explored his chest through his shirt, fingers tracing lazy patterns.

"I was really scared," she whispered, her voice dripping with false innocence. "A man following me through dark corridors..."

Jax’s eye twitched.

"Hard to ignore when someone wraps their mana around me like a leash."

She made an innocent face. Those green eyes widened with practiced confusion.

"I promise it wasn’t me. Why would I do such a thing when I already have this neck in my grasp?"

Her free hand slithered up to his throat. Fingers dancing across his Adam’s apple. Teasing. Testing.

Jax grabbed her wrist firmly.

"Enough. I can’t play with you anymore. I have noble duties today."

He tried to sound professional.

"I need to ensure no one causes chaos at this party. And if they do, I have to outshine them."

She ignored him completely.

Her hand traveled past his chest. Slipped beneath his jacket. Past his shirt buttons. Down, down, down to his pants.

Then she grabbed his cock through the fabric.

Jax twitched involuntarily.

"I’ve been waiting for this one," she purred, her expression turning genuinely delighted. "For such a long time."

"Careful, grandma." Jax kept his voice steady despite the situation. "At your age, too much excitement might stop your heart."

She chuckled. Dark. Dangerous.

"Grandma? At this age, I’ve played with more men and boys than your hair count, child. Drained them until they couldn’t walk straight for weeks."

Jax smirked.

"And I’ve made women scream my name so loud their ancestors heard it. So let’s not compare body counts or whatever degenerate statistics you’re tracking."

Her hand didn’t stop.

It reached his balls. Not hurting. Just jiggling. A gentle squeeze that sent electricity up his spine.

His cock stirred. The beast awakening despite his protests.

Her face moved closer. Jax anticipated a kiss.

But she bypassed his lips entirely. Her mouth stopped at his ear. He caught her scent. Floral. Ancient. Intoxicating.

"You really were a bad boy," she breathed. "Leaving your mama. Ignoring her."

Her grip on his balls tightened suddenly.

Pain jolted through his body.

"Therefore, mama will punish you for everything today."

She released his balls immediately. Her hand retreated slowly. Navigating past his awakened cock. Teasing his nipples. Then finally exiting his clothes.

"Oops." She made another innocent face. "Sorry, dear. I didn’t intend to—"

"You said you’re on duty to inspect chaos at this party." Her voice turned silky. "So why not do your duty and calm me down? I’m really frustrated. Angry at a certain someone."

She raised one leg.

Her heel dropped to the floor.

Clatter.

From this angle, Jax could see everything.

Her panties were soaked. Not damp. SOAKED. The white fabric had turned translucent, sticking to her pussy like a second skin. Her juices had completely drenched the material.

’She’s been craving this from the very beginning.’

Then it clicked.

The quest. It said to fuck Ilythra. The time limit was absurdly short. And that name, he’d heard it somewhere before.

’Could the system have known about all this? Could everything unfolding be the predetermined route of the quest?’

Then he remembered.

Nerith’s father. The demon general. He’d mentioned this woman by name.

Queen Ilythra Something.

Jax gulped.

He closed the distance. Lifted her raised leg onto his shoulder. Looked down at her with calculated interest.

"May I know this chaotic mother’s name? For records, of course."

She gave him a confused glance.

"Well, that came out of nowhere."

Then the innocent mask returned.

"That’s really rude, Jax. Forgetting your mama’s name."

She raised her other leg. The second heel clattered to the floor. Both legs wrapped around his neck. She pulled him toward her with surprising strength.

"But I’ll forgive you this time. You can call me Mommy Ilythra until my mood changes to something else."

Jax’s smile widened. ’The food is literally being served to me without any work.’
